SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?breed ?breedLabel ?lifeExpectancy ?averageWeight WHERE {
  ?breed wdt:P31 wd:Q190226 .
  ?breed rdfs:label ?breedLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?breedLabel) = "en")
  .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?breed wdt:P1264 ?lifeExpectancy
  }
  .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?breed wdt:P2044 ?averageWeight
  }
}
```
